name: Secure Endpoint Review
shortDescription: Applies secure-default checks to API endpoints before merge.
longDescription: Combines static checks and manual review to enforce auth, validation, and data-handling controls in endpoint implementations.
author: ARS Security

inputs.name: endpoint_code
inputs.description: Handler and middleware code for reviewed endpoint.

inputs.name: auth_policy
inputs.description: Role and permission requirements for endpoint access.

includedAssets.name: scripts/scan_fastapi_route.py
includedAssets.description: Performs basic static scans for missing auth and weak validation.

failureModes: Context-specific abuse cases are missed by static checks.
Policy ambiguity leads to inconsistent authorization controls.
Fixes may break backward compatibility if not staged carefully.

examples.title: Invoice endpoint auth hardening
examples.summary: Detected missing role check and unsafe error detail leakage.

changelog.summary: Initial release for endpoint security review workflow.
